title: gastrochilus deltoglossus
intro: Gastrochilus deltoglossus, also known as the Himalayan orchid or Himalayan tuber orchid, is a type of orchid native to the Himalayan region. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antioxidant activities. The health benefits of Gastrochilus deltoglossus include its ability to treat various ailments such as fever, respiratory issues, and digestive problems, as well as its potential to lower blood sugar levels and improve cardiovascular health. In herbal preparations, Gastrochilus deltoglossus is often used in the form of decoctions, infusions, or powders, and can be consumed as a tea or added to other medicinal formulas.
